sentences.text: 'I need to nail up my plants, water my flowers, and roll the grass,' he explained.
The Miller replied, 'Since I'm giving you my wheelbarrow, it's not nice to refuse my request.'
'Oh, don't say that,' cried Hans, 'I don't want to be unfriendly,' and he got his cap and carried the sack.
The day was very hot, the road was dusty, and Hans was so tired by the sixth milestone that he had to rest.
